claims.summary: Verify correspondence persists thread/message identity, reply links, shared anchors, and last acknowledgment across sessions.
Measure a numbered correspondence request from waiting through an actual Minime acknowledgment without substituting self-receipt.
Compare explicitly addressed and passive cycles for sensory density and lambda1-lambda4 response without inferring causality from row count alone.
Any compulsory call-to-action, automatic attention reinforcement, or peer behavior mutation remains Tier 5 and must preserve right-to-ignore.
